items.name: Grilled Chicken Shawarma Plate
items.description: Marinated chicken thigh grilled over charcoal, served with garlic sauce, pickles, and rice.

items.name: Crispy Fried Chicken Burger
items.description: Buttermilk-fried chicken breast, slaw, and spicy mayo in a brioche bun.

items.name: Vegan Pasta Primavera
items.description: Penne tossed with seasonal roasted vegetables in a olive-oil and herb sauce, no animal products.

items.name: Classic Beef Lasagna
items.description: Layered pasta with slow-cooked beef ragu, bechamel, and mozzarella, oven-baked.

items.name: Grilled Seabass with Lemon Butter
items.description: Whole seabass fillet grilled and finished with a lemon butter sauce, served with sauteed greens.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Creamy arborio rice slow-cooked with wild mushrooms and finished with truffle oil.

items.name: Chicken Fattah
items.description: Traditional Egyptian dish of crispy bread, rice, garlic-vinegar sauce, and grilled chicken.

items.name: Vegan Lentil Soup
items.description: Slow-simmered red lentils with cumin, onion, and a touch of lemon, no dairy or meat.
